one_line_thesis: Long Island cemetery (501c13) with ~$162M FY2024 net assets; OTC $575 quote; IRR pending verified share count and Form 990 PDFs.

deep_dive.executive_summary: Pinelawn is an operating cemetery with Form 990 economics of roughly $43 million revenue and $162 million net assets in FY2024. The OTC quote is about $575. Base 7-year annual return is -29% on proof-backed component value versus that quote, using a provisional share count that still conflicts with dividend cash math. We cannot treat the return as actionable until shares outstanding and the cash dividend are verified. Dhando is partial. Stance: watch; Vicki brief remains open for Form 990 PDF harvest.

pricing_analysis.conclusion: Hurdle prices are derived from the decision-grade universal contract; they do not constitute a capital decision.

decision.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

optionality.rule: Every option requires a beneficiary, probability, timing, remaining capital, failure case, and non-overlap control; absence of option value must be explicit rather than unvalued.

committee.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

method_fit.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
method_fit.rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: Component changes are classified from observable differences in quantity, comparable method, probability, timing, capital, evidence, and schedule scope.

component_valuation.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

economic_value.accounting_reference: Form 990 FY2024 extract via ProPublica (PDF pending). Not SEC GAAP.

economic_claim.description: One provisional Pinelawn Cemetery equity unit using aggregator share count until the true economic unit count is verified.
economic_claim.unit_source: Provisional aggregator ~3.46M shares; conflicts with $45.40 indicated dividend vs FY2024 NI $5.3M [HUMAN REVIEW — do not size on this denominator]
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Nonprofit cemetery: 990 net assets + operations + land gap less illiquidity/governance reserve. Market price $575 is not reconciled until share count is fixed.

valuation_proof.evidence: FY2024 Form 990 extract: revenue ~$42.9M, net income ~$5.3M, net assets ~$161.9M. Proof base 46.7929/sh via net_asset_value@1.0. Share count and Schedule D remain [HUMAN REVIEW].

valuation_decision.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

personas.falsifier: FCF yield < 0.5% or commoditized archetype (turnaround/optionality only)
personas.label: Chris Hohn / TCI

personas.falsifier: dhando -> none OR net-debt/EBITDA > 3 OR bear return < -15%
personas.label: Mohnish Pabrai

personas.falsifier: No asset intensity / pricing power (moat eroding + non-croupier)
personas.label: Murray Stahl
personas.why_silent: Universe criteria not met: hard_asset_archetype, moat_durable

personas.falsifier: FCF yield below universe median OR base IRR below median
personas.label: Joel Greenblatt
personas.why_silent: Universe criteria not met: earnings_yield_high, quality_proxy

personas.falsifier: Operating lens only — no dated inefficiency / catalyst
personas.label: John Mihaljevic / MOI

personas.falsifier: No dated contractual payoff or royalty/trust structure
personas.label: Horizon Kinetics
personas.why_silent: Universe criteria not met: asset_or_event, dated_payoff

personas.falsifier: Supply response, reinvestment requirements, or incremental returns cannot be measured.
personas.label: Marathon / Capital Returns

personas.falsifier: Debt maturities, refinancing exposure, liquidity, or downside recovery cannot be reconciled.
personas.label: Howard Marks / Oaktree

personas.falsifier: Asset value lacks an independently evidenced realization path or is already capitalized in operating cash flow.
personas.label: Klarman / Baupost

active_lenses.label: Chris Hohn
active_lenses.falsifier: FCF yield < 0.5% or commoditized archetype (turnaround/optionality only)

timeline.label: Universal valuation contract backfill: calculation proofs attached to all four additive components
FY2024 Form 990 filed (ProPublica); revenue ~$42.9M, net assets ~$161.9M

industry.structure: Local cemetery and memorial services with high land and zoning barriers; few public comps.
industry.share_shift: Stable local franchise; competition from other Long Island cemeteries and cremation trend.
industry.trend: Cremation mix rising industry-wide; land-constrained cemeteries retain pricing power on remaining inventory.

top_claims.claim: Pinelawn is an operating cemetery with Form 990 economics of roughly $43 million revenue and $162 million net assets in FY2024. The OTC quote is about $575. We cannot publish a base annual return until shares outstanding and the cash dividend are verified: aggregator figures near 3.46 million shares imply a ~$2 billion
Base annual return is **pending** until shares and Form 990 PDFs are verified.
*Primary risk: Public share-count and dividend data are wrong, so any screen-based “cheap cemetery” thesis is false.

risk_claims.claim: *Primary risk: Public share-count and dividend data are wrong, so any screen-based “cheap cemetery” thesis is false.
Land may be restricted or trust-encumbered.
